reviews.comment:
Todo espectacular..la atención de 10 y gracias a Gonzalo por el trato, ya que pare en el motel muy buena onda

(Translated by Google)
Everything was spectacular... the service was 10/10 and thanks to Gonzalo for the treatment, since I stayed at the motel with a very good vibe.
